sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_files (id INT PRIMARY KEY, file_path VARCHAR(255));
SELECT id, file_to_string(file_path) AS file_contents FROM test_files WHERE file_contents LIKE '%example%';
SELECT id FROM test_files WHERE file_to_string(file_path) LIKE (SELECT CONCAT('%', name, '%') FROM users WHERE status = 'active');
CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), status VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO users (user_id, name, status) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', 'active'), (2, 'Jane Smith', 'inactive');
SELECT user_id FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%' || (SELECT file_to_string('data/special_names.txt') FROM test_files LIMIT 1);
CREATE TABLE logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, log_message VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO logs (log_id, log_message) VALUES (1, (SELECT file_to_string(file_path) FROM test_files WHERE id = 1));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs WHERE log_message LIKE '%' || (SELECT file_to_string('data/log_pattern.txt'));
SELECT id FROM test_files WHERE LENGTH(file_to_string(file_path)) < 5000 OR file_to_string(file_path) LIKE 'error%';
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS total_entries FROM DUAL;
